guardduty.ipset.Activate.Description: Indicates whether or not GuardDuty uses the `IPSet`.

guardduty.ipset.DetectorId.Description: The unique ID of the detector of the GuardDuty account that you want to create an IPSet for.

guardduty.ipset.Format.Description: The format of the file that contains the IPSet.
guardduty.ipset.Format.Allowed values: ALIEN_VAULT | FIRE_EYE | OTX_CSV | PROOF_POINT | STIX | TXT

guardduty.ipset.Location.Description: The URI of the file that contains the IPSet.

guardduty.ipset.Name.Description: The user-friendly name to identify the IPSet.   Allowed characters are alphanumerics, spaces, hyphens (-), and underscores (_).
